calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2020 Off Calendar

Application For Default Judgment By Plaintiff Bootup Ventures, Llc Against Defendant Bouxtie Inc. Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 585(B)
Off Calendar Jan-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Bouxtie Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Vicki Gross, CSR #5525. Telephone: 415-551-3730. Email: vgross@sftc.org.

David P. Nemecek, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bootup Ventures, LLC.
Marco Ton Vaanholt, Managing Member of Bootup Ventures, LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Bouxtie Inc.
Plaintiff's complaint for Specific Performance, Breach of Contract and Unrich Enrichment was filed on November 18, 2018, and personally served on defendant Bouxtie Inc.'s Agent for Service of Process on November 21, 2018.
Default as to defendant Bouxtie Inc. was entered on December 31, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on September 20, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bootup Ventures, LLC, and against the defaulted defendant Bouxtie Inc., as follows:

Attorney Fees - $33,623.45.
Costs - $580.00.

Total - $34,203.45.

Additionally, it is further Ordered, Adjudged and Decreed that defendant Bouxtie Inc. shall specifically perform paragraph 3 of the MOU by issuing fully vested warrants to BootUp Ventures, LLC to purchase common stock equaling three percent of Bouxtie Inc.'s "Fully Diluted Capitalization," as that term is defined in paragraph 1 of Schedule 1 to the Mou.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Application For Default Judgment By Plaintiff Bootup Ventures, Llc Against Defendant Bouxtie Inc. Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 585(B)
Off Calendar Nov-19-2019 Continued To Jan-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2019 Continued To Feb-04-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: David P. Nemecek, Jr., Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Feb-04-2020 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
